name: Filesystem Server
description: Read and write files with configurable access controls. Supports reading, writing, searching, and directory listing.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Local filesystem access only within configured allowed directories.

name: Fetch Server
description: Retrieve web content by fetching URLs and converting HTML to markdown for easy consumption by LLMs.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Outbound network access only. Converts fetched content to markdown.

name: Git Server
description: Interact with Git repositories including cloning, committing, branching, diffing, and viewing history.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Requires filesystem and network access for remote operations.

name: GitHub Server
description: Interact with GitHub repositories, issues, pull requests, branches, and search via the GitHub API.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Personal access token required. Network access limited to GitHub API.

name: Slack Server
description: Interact with Slack workspaces to read messages, post updates, manage channels, and search conversations.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Bot token required. Network access limited to Slack API.

name: SQLite Server
description: Query and manage SQLite databases with read/write support, schema introspection, and business intelligence memo generation.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Local database access only.

name: PostgreSQL Server
description: Connect to PostgreSQL databases for querying, schema inspection, and data manipulation.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Network access limited to PostgreSQL wire protocol.

name: Puppeteer Server
description: Control a headless Chrome browser for web scraping, screenshots, form filling, and automated testing.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Launches headless Chrome subprocess. Network access for page navigation.

name: Brave Search Server
description: Perform web and local searches using the Brave Search API with support for pagination and filtering.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. API key required. Network access limited to Brave Search API.

name: Google Maps Server
description: Access Google Maps API for geocoding, directions, place search, and distance calculations.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Google Maps API key required. Network access limited to Google Maps API.

name: Memory Server
description: Knowledge graph-based persistent memory system that stores entities, relations, and observations across conversations.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Local file-based knowledge graph. No network access.

name: Sequential Thinking Server
description: Dynamic problem-solving through sequential thought steps with branching, revision, and hypothesis tracking.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Pure computation, no filesystem or network access.

name: Time Server
description: Get current time in various timezones and convert between timezones with IANA timezone support.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Pure computation, no filesystem or network access.

name: Playwright MCP Server
description: Browser automation using Playwright for web scraping, testing, and interaction. Supports Chrome, Firefox, and WebKit.
author: Microsoft
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Microsoft project. Launches browser subprocess. Network for page navigation.

name: Stripe MCP Server
description: Integrate with Stripe for managing customers, products, payments, invoices, and subscriptions via the Stripe API.
author: Stripe
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Stripe product. Remote MCP proxy to mcp.stripe.com. API key required.

name: Sentry MCP Server
description: Query and analyze Sentry error tracking data including issues, events, releases, and project configurations.
author: Sentry
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Sentry product. Auth token required. Network limited to Sentry API.

name: Grafana MCP Server
description: Query Grafana dashboards, data sources, and alerts. Execute Prometheus, Loki, and other data source queries.
author: Grafana Labs
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Grafana product. API key required. Network limited to Grafana instance.

name: Neo4j MCP Server
description: Query and manage Neo4j graph databases using Cypher. Browse nodes, relationships, and run graph analytics.
author: Neo4j
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Neo4j project. Network limited to Neo4j bolt protocol.

name: Supabase MCP Server
description: Manage Supabase projects, databases, edge functions, and storage. Execute SQL and manage schemas.
author: Supabase
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Supabase community project. Access token required. Network limited to Supabase API.

name: Neon MCP Server
description: Manage Neon serverless Postgres databases, branches, and run SQL queries with natural language support.
author: Neon
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Neon product. API key required. Network limited to Neon API.

name: Cloudflare MCP Server
description: Manage Cloudflare Workers, KV, R2, D1 databases, DNS, and other Cloudflare services from your agent.
author: Cloudflare
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Cloudflare product. API token required. Network limited to Cloudflare API.

name: Upstash MCP Server
description: Manage Upstash Redis and QStash message queues. Execute Redis commands and manage serverless data stores.
author: Upstash
scan_summary: No issues found. Official Upstash product. API key required. Network limited to Upstash services.

name: Everything Server
description: MCP protocol test and demo server exercising all MCP features including tools, resources, prompts, and sampling.
author: Anthropic
scan_summary: No issues found. Test/demo server for MCP protocol features. No filesystem or network access.
